# unifi_site_to_site_vpn (List Resource)

List site-to-site VPN networks in a site.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# List all site-to-site VPNs in the default site
list "unifi_site_to_site_vpn" "all" {
  provider = unifi
}

# List site-to-site VPNs in a specific site
list "unifi_site_to_site_vpn" "site_vpns" {
  provider = unifi

  config {
    site = "my-site"
  }
}

# List site-to-site VPNs filtered by name
list "unifi_site_to_site_vpn" "filtered" {
  provider = unifi

  config {
    filter {
      name  = "name"
      value = "branch-office"
    }
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `filter` (Block List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--filter))
- `site` (String) The name of the site to list site-to-site VPN networks from.

<a id="nestedblock--filter"></a>
### Nested Schema for `filter`

Required:

- `name` (String) The name of the filter to apply. Supported values are: `name`.
- `value` (String) The value to filter by.
